{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Swamp Fire
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Swamp Fire]] is a swarm of knuckle-sized poisonous fireballs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
